case.title: U.S. v. UNION CENTRAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

opinion.h: U.S. v. UNION CENTRAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY. , 365 U.S. 858 (1961)
UNITED STATES, petitioner, v. UNION CENTRAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY. No. 722.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Oberdorfer, and I. Henry Kutz and Fred E. Young-
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Michigan granted and case transferred to the summary calendar.
